description_long: This is a modern, freestanding refrigerator with a sleek, rectangular form and a matte black finish. The front features four distinct doors, likely indicating a French-door or multi-compartment design, with vertical handles running the length of each door for easy access. A digital control panel is visible on the upper right door, suggesting advanced temperature and function controls. The rear side includes a vented panel and a power cord, indicating the location of the compressor and electrical components. The sides are flat and unadorned, maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, with metal as the primary material and subtle seams outlining the door edges.
description: A matte black, four-door refrigerator with vertical handles and a digital control panel on the front. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a vented panel and power cord at the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a vented panel, power cord, and compressor area at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a flat, unadorned surface with the power cord visible near the base.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting four doors with vertical handles and a digital control panel on the upper right door.
description_view_3: Right side view with a flat, featureless surface and the power cord trailing from the back.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, integrated handles running the length of each door, flush with the door surface.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular vent with horizontal slats located on the lower rear panel.
